systemSupplierIdentifier.comment: Name and address information of the supplier.

vehicleManufacturerSparePartNumber.comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM

DTCFormatIdentifier.comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

lists.0: Device and failure type ODB codding
lists.20: circuit short to ground or open
lists.21: circuit short to battery or open
lists.38: signal rate of change below threshold
lists.39: signal rate of change above threshold
lists.40: signal bias level out of range / zero adj. failure
lists.101: signal has too few transitions / events
lists.102: signal has too many transitions / events
lists.130: alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
lists.131: value of signal protection calculation incorrect
lists.151: Component or sys. operation obstructed or blocked

lists.2: Black screen displayed on RVC screen
lists.3: Black screen and pictogram displayed on RVC screen

lists.1: L1C - FFK - ESS ou DIESEL - CHGAUG - TRSEV1
lists.3: L1C - FFK - ESS ou DIESEL - CHGNOR - TRSEV2
lists.4: L1C - FFK - ESS ou DIESEL - CHGAUG - TRSEV2
lists.6: L1C - FFK - ESS ou DIESEL - CHGNOR - TRSEV1
lists.8: L2C - FFK - ESS ou DIESEL - CHGNOR - TRSEV1
lists.9: L2C - FFK - ESS ou DIESEL - CHGAUG - TRSEV1
lists.11: L2C - FFK - ESS OU DIESEL - CHGNOR - TRSEV2
lists.12: L2C - FFK - ESS ou DIESEL - CHGAUG - TRSEV2

Routine Control Subfunction.comment: Routine control type - VALUES OTHER THAN 1, 2 & 3 ARE RESERVED AND SHOULD NOT BE USED.

lists.4: Main Display - All pixels ON color 1 (red)
lists.6: Main Display - All pixels ON color 2 (green)
lists.8: Main Display - All pixels ON color 3 (blue)

RoutineIdentifier.comment: Routine identifier - This is an example. See documentation for more information.

RoutineIdentifier Recived data.comment: Routine identifier - This is an example. See documentation for more information.
